summary: Verified Care vs Fit pillar reorganization. All features are working correctly: Care shows support/caregiving goals (Grooming, Vet, Boarding & Daycare, Pet Sitting, Behavior Support, Senior & Special Needs), Fit shows activity goals (Weight loss, Build strength, Senior care, Puppy training), Stay shows travel-led goals only (no boarding). TransformationStories and QuickWinTip components are pillar-aware.
critical_code_review_comments: ConversationalEntry.jsx: PILLAR_GOALS correctly defines care goals without Training/Walking - VERIFIED
ConversationalEntry.jsx: Stay pillar goals are travel-led only (no boarding) - VERIFIED
CarePage.jsx: Quick Book section has exactly 4 cards (Grooming, Vet, Boarding & Daycare, Let Mira Recommend) - VERIFIED
TransformationStories.jsx: Correctly separates CARE_STORIES and FIT_STORIES based on pillar prop - VERIFIED
QuickWinTip.jsx: TIPS_DATABASE.care and TIPS_DATABASE.fit have pillar-appropriate tips - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pillar reorganization verified. Care = Support/Caregiving (Grooming, Vet, Boarding & Daycare, Pet Sitting, Behavior Support, Senior & Special Needs). Fit = Activity/Improvement (Weight loss, Build strength, Senior care, Puppy training, Walk/Training). Stay = Travel accommodation only (no boarding). TransformationStories component uses pillar prop to show different stories.

fit_quick_win_tip.tip_types: Fitness tips including walk, training, swim, exercise, agility

mocked_api_note: TransformationStories uses hardcoded CARE_STORIES and FIT_STORIES arrays (not from backend API)
